file_insights.purpose: Manages validation workflow with state management for validation results, history, loading, and error states
key_functions: validate(contentId) - Triggers validation and updates result state
fetchHistory(contentId) - Loads validation history from API
clear() - Resets all state to initial values
file_insights.performance_optimizations: useCallback for all functions to prevent unnecessary re-renders

file_insights.purpose: Displays theological validation results with interactive controls and visual feedback
features: Score display with dynamic color coding (green >=80%, yellow 50-79%, red <50%)
Flag list with alert icons for doctrinal issues
file_insights.error_handling: Displays error messages and shows loading state during operations

file_insights.purpose: Displays expandable/collapsible list of citations with sources and quoted text
features: Empty state handling (returns null if no citations)
Citation count display with BookOpen icon
Accordion UI with multiple expansion support
Quoted text in blockquote format with styling

patterns_discovered.description: useValidation hook handles all business logic and API calls, while ValidationPanel and CitationList are pure presentational components
Score thresholds (80%, 50%) determine visual appearance with green/yellow/red coloring applied consistently across score display, progress bar, and badges
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear visual hierarchy and quick status recognition

patterns_discovered.description: CitationList uses Accordion component for expandable/collapsible citation details to reduce visual clutter
patterns_discovered.benefit: Scalable UI for large citation lists, improved readability

patterns_discovered.description: Three distinct states managed: validating (during API call), loading (during history fetch), error (API failures)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear user feedback at each stage of async operations

patterns_discovered.description: Generic TypeScript types (ValidationResult, Citation) used consistently across hook and components
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type safety, IDE autocomplete, easier refactoring

gotchas_discovered.description: useValidation hook requires explicit validate() or fetchHistory() calls; no automatic validation on mount or contentId change
gotchas_discovered.impact: Parent component must handle triggering validation via useEffect

gotchas_discovered.description: Color thresholds (80, 50) are embedded in component functions getScoreColor() and getProgressColor()
gotchas_discovered.impact: Changing thresholds requires code modification; not configurable via props or config

gotchas_discovered.description: fetchHistory loads multiple validation results into history array, but only result[0] is displayed; other history items are not surfaced in UI
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users cannot browse previous validations or compare results over time

gotchas_discovered.description: Error handling uses fallback messages ('Validation failed', 'Failed to fetch validation history') without error details
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users cannot diagnose validation failures without checking console

gotchas_discovered.description: Validation results are point-in-time snapshots; no mechanism for long-running validations or status polling
gotchas_discovered.impact: Large validations may timeout without user feedback

approach_details.task_completion: All three required components successfully implemented: useValidation hook, ValidationPanel with score display and color coding, and CitationList with expandable citations
approach_details.code_quality: Clean, well-structured TypeScript with proper type annotations, reasonable component decomposition, and appropriate use of React hooks
approach_details.ux_considerations: Good visual feedback with icons, color coding, loading states, and empty states; interactive elements (expand/collapse citations) enhance usability
approach_details.architecture: Proper separation of logic (hook) from presentation (components); follows React best practices with useCallback memoization

recommendations.suggestion: Make score thresholds configurable via component props or context, allowing different validation contexts to use different thresholds
Implement toast notifications or sidebar alerts when validation completes, especially for long-running operations
Add validation history browser in ValidationPanel to allow users to view and compare previous validation results
Enhance error messages to include specific failure reasons (API error codes, timeout details) to aid user debugging
Implement auto-refresh capability for validation history to show new validations in real-time when contentId changes
Add ARIA labels to score display and progress bar for screen reader compatibility, especially for color-dependent indicators
Add unit tests for useValidation hook covering success/error scenarios, and snapshot tests for ValidationPanel component variants
